# [CHECKLIST TYPE] Checklist: [FEATURE OR SECTION NAME]

**Purpose**: [Brief description of the review scope]
**Created**: [DATE]
**Feature/Section**: [Link to spec.md, section.yml, or relevant documentation]

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` workflow from
the current Bioinfo SDD context and `.specify/memory/constitution.md`.

## Section Scope

- [ ] CHK001 The work is one bounded analysis section or an explicitly
  non-analysis infrastructure change.
- [ ] CHK002 Required input state and produced output state are declared.
- [ ] CHK003 Allowed and forbidden claims are explicit.

## Reference Resolution

- [ ] CHK004 Pack, workflow, task, skill, package, tool, wrapper, adapter, and
  check refs resolve through local manifests.
- [ ] CHK005 Active package/tool context comes from section-local
  `installed_refs/`.
- [ ] CHK006 Tool bundle replacement preserves historical revisions.

## Execution Boundary

- [ ] CHK007 Wrappers contain bounded analysis logic and declare written keys.
- [ ] CHK008 Adapters bind wrappers without hidden biological analysis logic.
- [ ] CHK009 Overwrite behavior has explicit approval when existing keys may be
  replaced.

## Gates And Evidence

- [ ] CHK010 `spec_review`, `plan_review`, `task_review`, and
  `evidence_acceptance` status is recorded.
- [ ] CHK011 Deterministic checks or tests are named and results are recorded.
- [ ] CHK012 Evidence links refs, run state, logs, check JSON, artifacts,
  skipped capabilities, caveats, and accepted claims.

## Notes

- Add findings inline with file paths and command outputs where useful.
- Mark items complete only after the corresponding artifact or review record is
  present in the repository.
